title: Bonded: Simply More Compatibility
description: Adds Simply More's non-unique weapons to Bonded's leveling system.
body:
Adds Simply More's non-unique weapons to Bonded's leveling system.
Unique weapons, runic weapons, and named weapons **do not** benefit from this.

**Requirements:**
Neoforge 1.21.1
[Bonded](https://modrinth.com/mod/bonded)
[Simply More](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-more)

Credit to [iamkaf](https://modrinth.com/user/iamkaf), creator of [Bonded](https://modrinth.com/mod/bonded).

Recommended for use with [Bonded: Simply Swords Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/bonded-simply-swords-compatibility)

Bug Reports and Questions: https://discord.gg/QNR3xKuX

Icon art inspired by the works of Hilma af Klint (1862-1944).
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hilma_af_Klint
